name: Oriental Cole Slaw
recipeIngredient: 2 cups finely shredded napa cabbage (8 ounces)
1/4 cup chopped jicama or chopped water chestnuts
3 tbsp rice vinegar or white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dressing ingredients.
2. Toss all salad ingredients with the dressing, allowing at least several hours for flavors to meld, or even up to a day.
3. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Leftovers will keep well and remain crisp for up to one week.
